## Fit with Existing Design

     versioning.md. Does your idea fit the V1/V2 scope split? -->

- [ ] Fits V1 scope (base mechanics + appliances)
- [ ] Belongs in V2 (automation/machines)
- [ ] Could be a separate addon mod
- [ ] Not sure — maintainer please advise
